seedanceSegments.title: Hook violet batter pour
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first pour of lilac mochi batter into a donut ring, whisk ribbon, flour contrast, brief island context.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context (not as mandatory wide framing). Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead pour and pan lip payoff. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to lock light terrazzo countertop material. Use @UbeMochiBatterLiquid only as violet batter viscosity, gloss, and homogenous lilac color. Use @Whisk only as whisk tine shape. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR, texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s thick violet stream pours from spouted cup into one metal donut ring; 0.9-1.6s meniscus rises flush to pan lip with surface tension quiver (payoff); 1.6-2.3s whisk slices batter leaving elastic ribbon; 2.3-3.0s white mochiko flour cascades onto wet violet; 3.0-3.7s sugar dissolves in butter gloss; 3.7-5.0s brief overhead island context with bowl. Scale lock: donut ring outer diameter 3 in / 7.5-8 cm, center hole ~1 in / 2.5 cm; batter meniscus at lip, not overflowing. Negative scale: not oversized rings, not miniature rings, not cake domes. Kitchen lock: same light terrazzo, same black flush induction edge if visible. Global negatives: no text, no music, no voice, no ingredient lineup table, no character face.

references.role: violet mochi batter color and pour viscosity
references.name: UbeMochiBatterLiquid
references.label: UbeMochiBatterLiquid

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off pour.
seedanceSegments.risk: Batter may read as cake batter without mochi gloss reference; ring scale drift without restated locks.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: thick liquid pour; soft plop; whisk drag; dry flour whisper

seedanceSegments.title: Mix ube color bloom
seedanceSegments.description: Emulsify yolks, ube jam marble, color homogenize, milk thin, fold dry, elastic tail.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active island counter framing. Use @UbeMochiBatterLiquid as target homogenous lilac batter color after mixing. Use @Whisk only as whisk shape. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s lumpy butter-sugar turns satin as yolks emulsify; 1.0-2.0s ube jam marbles magenta then blends; 2.0-3.0s purple coloring blooms to deep lilac; 3.0-4.0s milk stream thins batter; 4.0-5.0s dry mochiko folds in, white streaks vanish; 5.0-6.0s whisk lifts elastic violet tail. Scale lock: bowl-scale only, not final ring size. Kitchen lock: same terrazzo and induction geometry. Global negatives: no scrambled egg texture, no neon pink batter, no text.

references.name: UbeMochiBatterLiquid
references.label: UbeMochiBatterLiquid

seedanceSegments.continuity: Batter color must match segment-01 pour reference.
seedanceSegments.risk: Color drift to pink/blue; lumpy-to-smooth may morph into scramble.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: whisk through batter; milk pour; fold squelch

seedanceSegments.title: Fill pan to brim
seedanceSegments.description: Spray cavities, sequential pour to brim across six rings, static pan hero.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for all pan-fill shots. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to lock terrazzo edge if frame widens. Use @UbeMochiBatterLiquid as batter pour viscosity. Use @UbeBatterFilledDonutPan only as six-ring filled topology target: brim-level meniscus, flat tops, exactly six cavities. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.6s spray mist in one cavity; 0.6-1.6s pour fills first ring to brim; 1.6-2.6s second and third rings fill; 2.6-3.6s all six rings flush, no overflow; 3.6-4.3s static six-ring pan; 4.3-5.0s macro batter surface pearls. Scale lock: metal six-cavity donut pan, outer ring 3 in / 7.5-8 cm, hole ~1 in / 2.5 cm, exactly six rings, filled to lip. Negative scale: not oversized, not miniature, not five or seven rings. Global negatives: no fantasy overflow rise, no text, no silicone pan.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Ring scale matches segment-01; pan state carries to bake segment.
seedanceSegments.risk: Ring count drift; Seedance may invent tall domes instead of flat brim fill.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: spray hiss; pour stream; settle tick

seedanceSegments.title: Bake hard-cut reveal
seedanceSegments.description: Tray into open oven, raw pan reference, hard cut to baked rings, skewer and bounce, flat bottom lock.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @OvenWide for tray slide into already-open oven (no door hinge action). Use @OvenCloseup for baked texture checks. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only if wider kitchen glimpse needed. Use @UbeBatterFilledDonutPan only as raw filled rings before bake. Use @BakedUbeMochiDonutsTray only as baked target: matte lilac rings, light crackle tops, flat bottoms, minimal rise. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s tray slides into open oven; 1.2-2.2s raw filled pan visible; 2.2-2.5s hard cut; 2.5-4.0s baked rings per reference, fine cracks; 4.0-5.2s skewer with moist crumbs; 5.2-6.2s gentle press springs back; 6.2-7.2s steam on exit; 7.2-8.0s flat bottom profile, no tall dome. Scale lock: same six rings, 3 in / 7.5-8 cm outer diameter. Negative scale: not cake domes, not puffy muffins, not smooth spheres. Global negatives: no oven door open/close, no morphing rise, no text.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Baked topology must match rack scenes later; flat bottoms mandatory.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: tray slide; oven hum; crisp tick; soft bounce

seedanceSegments.title: Cool and glaze prep
seedanceSegments.description: Turn out to rack, six unglazed rings, whisk ube glaze to satin ribbon.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active island framing. Use @BakedUbeMochiDonutsTray only as unglazed baked ring scale and matte lilac color on rack. Use @Whisk and @Spoon only as utensil shapes. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s turn out onto rack, flat bases visible; 1.0-2.0s six matte rings static; 2.0-3.2s ube jam whisked into milk; 3.2-4.4s sifted sugar clouds in; 4.4-5.2s glaze ribbon drips from whisk; 5.2-6.0s glaze bowl beside unglazed rack. Scale lock: six rings, 3 in / 7.5-8 cm, intact. No dip yet. Kitchen lock: terrazzo unchanged. Global negatives: no glaze dip on donuts yet, no text.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Unglazed rings match baked reference; glaze color lavender-satin.
seedanceSegments.risk: Premature dip in this segment would break outro lock timing.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: rack release; whisk; sugar sift; glaze drip

seedanceSegments.title: Glaze dip and sprinkles
seedanceSegments.description: Crown dip, flip upright, sprinkle rain, glossy close-up — destructive beat before hero lock.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as island framing. Use @GlazedUbeMochiDonutCrown only as target glazed crown with sprinkles and intact ring. Use @Spoon only as spoon shape near glaze bowl. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.4s crown dips halfway into lavender glaze; 1.4-2.8s flip upright, glaze curtain drips; 2.8-4.2s festive sprinkles rain on wet glaze; 4.2-5.6s macro glossy crown with sprinkle adhesion; 5.6-7.0s several glazed rings on rack. Scale lock: ring outer 3 in / 7.5-8 cm, intact geometry, no bite. Global negatives: no slice, no bite, no collapsed ring, no text. Character does not touch donuts.
seedanceSegments.promptInitial: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as island framing. seedanceSegments.continuity: After segment ends, all six rings must match FinalDishVisual state for segment-07.
seedanceSegments.risk: Ring collapse on dip; sprinkle storm obscures food.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: dip plunge; drip curtain; sprinkle ticks

seedanceSegments.title: Hero rack satisfaction
seedanceSegments.description: Six glazed donuts motionless on rack, kitchen context, mascot pleased without touching dish — outro prep.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as hero island framing. Use @FinalDishVisual only as finished six-ring glazed rack state — crowns glossy with sprinkles, intact, motionless. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for mascot identity and pleased pose; hands empty, do not touch donuts. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s six glazed rings on rack close-up, static; 1.2-2.2s wider island context; 2.2-3.2s single ring hero macro intact; 3.2-4.2s mascot pleased three-quarter, empty hands; 4.2-5.0s return to six donuts unchanged for outro handoff. Scale lock: six rings, 3 in / 7.5-8 cm, motionless. Global negatives: no dip, no sprinkle drop, no bite, no slice, no spoon dive, no character-dish contact, no text.

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro; app injects canonical prompt at sync.
